headline: 1X Technologies first agent baseline (rotation backfill). Established/exemplary boundary-case. NEO consumer humanoid pre-orders open: $20,000 Early Access (priority 2026 delivery) or $499/month subscription model; $200 fully-refundable deposit; US deliveries primarily 2026, expanding 2027. NEO design: 22-DoF Human Level Dexterity hands, 66-pound head-to-toe soft body, 150-pound lift / 55-pound carry capacity. Norwegian-headquartered, OpenAI strategic-investor (provides advanced language understanding and reasoning). FIRST consumer-scale home humanoid deployment in market. POSITIVE distinguishers: soft-body design (consumer-safety-positive); structured pre-order with refundable deposit; transparent pricing. RISK distinguishers: home-deployment context pre-dates regulatory framework (EU Machinery Regulation 2027, OSHA-humanoid 2027); consumer-data-privacy framework not publicly detailed; OpenAI investor-relationship adds Pentagon-classified-cohort proximity (OpenAI is cohort member); 1X Technologies is NOT a 2022 anti-weaponization pledge signatory. Published 81.4 / Exemplary band — band-boundary placement at established/exemplary threshold. Math-hygiene flag potential (consistent with cluster pattern). Recommend confirm at 81.4 with first-baseline rationale and math-hygiene flag.
key_evidence: 1X Technologies opened NEO consumer humanoid pre-orders: $20,000 Early Access with priority 2026 delivery; $499/month subscription model; $200 fully-refundable deposit. US deliveries primarily 2026, expanding 2027.
NEO design: 22-DoF Human Level Dexterity hands; 66-pound head-to-toe soft body of custom 3D lattice polymer structures; 150-pound lift capacity, 55-pound carry capacity.
Norwegian-headquartered company; OpenAI strategic-investor provides advanced language understanding and reasoning capabilities for NEO.
First consumer-scale home humanoid deployment in market.
1X Technologies status on 2022 anti-weaponization pledge: not confirmed in available sources (pledge signatories were Boston Dynamics, Agility, ANYbotics, Clearpath, Open Robotics, Unitree).
OpenAI investor relationship: structurally connects 1X to Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 AI cohort (OpenAI is cohort member), introducing INT-relevant supply-chain dimension.
Soft-body design (3D lattice polymer) is consumer-safety positive distinguisher vs traditional rigid-body humanoid form factor.

evidence.source: The Robot Report — NEO humanoid designed for household use, available for preorder
evidence.finding: Pre-order launch details; consumer-deployment scope; soft-body design framing.
Pricing transparency: $20,000 Early Access, $499/month subscription, $200 refundable deposit.

evidence.source: Robotics 24/7 — 1X announces NEO consumer-ready humanoid robot pre-order details
evidence.finding: Consumer-ready humanoid framing; structured pre-order with refundable deposit.

evidence.source: Humanoids Daily — 1X opens pre-orders for NEO humanoid robot at $20,000
INT News — Neo Humanoid Robot: 1X opens pre-orders between cost and privacy
evidence.finding: Cost and privacy concerns flagged for consumer-deployment context.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 4.0 confirmed. A1 detection: structured pre-order process surfaces consumer-experience signals; A4 amplification: media coverage and Norwegian regulatory context provide harm-signal amplification.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 4.0 confirmed. E1 affective resonance: NEO design framing acknowledges human-coexistence (chores assistance, soft-body); soft-body is empathically meaningful design choice.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 4.0 confirmed. AC2 proportionality: structured 2026 US delivery, 2027 expansion; AC4 response: refundable-deposit structure provides consumer-action proportionality.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 3.5 confirmed. EQ2 distributional awareness: $20K price + $499/month subscription place NEO out of reach for many households; first-deployment context concentrates capability among well-resourced consumers.
scoring_rationale.BND: 4.0 confirmed. B3 scope clarity: home-use deployment scope clearly defined; B5 consent: pre-order/refundable-deposit structure provides consumer-consent framework. Anti-weaponization pledge non-signatory status is sub-threshold INT-erosive but does not drop BND.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 4.0 confirmed. AB2 transparency: pricing, deployment, and design specifications publicly disclosed; AB4 reparation: refundable-deposit + subscription-model provide consumer-reparation pathways.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 4.0 confirmed. S1 causal reasoning: home-deployment context applies systemic-harm reasoning at consumer-product level; OpenAI investor relationship extends governance scaffolding.
scoring_rationale.INT: 4.0 confirmed. I1 consistency: declared consumer-humanoid mission consistent with NEO operational design; I2 non-performance: limited gap between marketing and pre-order operational reality. OpenAI Pentagon-cohort proximity is INT-relevant sub-threshold consideration.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction yields 73.4 vs published 81.4. Discrepancy +8.0 — MATH-HYGIENE FLAG (parallel to Apptronik cluster pattern). Both values are exemplary-or-established band; published placement is exemplary, reconstructed placement is established. Recommend math-hygiene flag for data-team review per cluster protocol; do NOT propose composite change in evidence cycle.

math_hygiene_flag.issue: Published composite 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4 from dimension means. Discrepancy +8.0 — parallel to Apptronik (also +8.0 with same dimension-mean profile). Suggests cluster-pattern in robotics-labs index: identical dimension means yielding +8.0 published-vs-reconstructed offset.
math_hygiene_flag.action: Flag for data-team review per math-hygiene cluster protocol. Note: Apptronik (today, +8.0) and 1X Technologies (today, +8.0) both flagged with identical reconstruction discrepancies and identical dimension-mean profiles — strong cluster-pattern indication.
math_hygiene_flag.evidence_basis_for_dimensions: All eight dimension means at 4.0 except EQU at 3.5 are well-supported by evidence; if exemplary-band placement is canonical, dimensions would need to average ~4.25 which is not supported by available evidence.
math_hygiene_flag.cluster_pattern_note: Apptronik and 1X Technologies show identical +8.0 reconstruction discrepancy with identical dimension profile (8x4.0 except EQU=3.5). Suggests systematic cluster-formula discrepancy in robotics-labs index.

negativeSignals: Anti-weaponization pledge non-signatory status; OpenAI investor relationship structurally connects to Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 cohort; consumer-deployment context pre-dates regulatory framework; consumer-data-privacy framework not publicly detailed; $20K/+ price concentrates capability among well-resourced consumers.
positiveSignals: Soft-body NEO design (consumer-safety positive); structured pre-order with refundable deposit; transparent pricing; OpenAI strategic-investor provides advanced reasoning capabilities; Norwegian regulatory context (EU-adjacent); first consumer-scale humanoid deployment in market is innovation-positive; 22-DoF Human Level Dexterity is technical-achievement-positive.
sector_context: Robotics Labs / commercial-humanoid + consumer-deployment cluster. Cross-reference: Apptronik (industrial-pilot deployment, also +8.0 math-hygiene flag), Boston Dynamics (industrial Hyundai deployment, anti-weaponization pledge), Agility (industrial Toyota Canada pilot, anti-weaponization pledge), Figure AI (BMW pilot + home-robot ambitions), Tesla Optimus (no pledge, factory deployment + disclosure-gap). 1X distinguished by FIRST consumer-scale home humanoid deployment + OpenAI investor + Norwegian HQ + soft-body design.
open_actions_resolved: First baseline established with exemplary-band confirmation (boundary case)
NEO pre-order launch and pricing structure absorbed
Math-hygiene flag for data-team review (+8.0 discrepancy, cluster pattern with Apptronik)
open_actions_carried: Math-hygiene escalation: published 81.4 vs reconstructed 73.4 (cluster pattern with Apptronik)
Watch: 2026 NEO US delivery operational reality vs pre-order claims
Watch: any consumer-deployment harm or incident report
Watch: any anti-weaponization pledge signing event
Watch: OpenAI Pentagon classified-cohort developments propagation through 1X investor relationship
